segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer the question below.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答下面的问题。

segments.text: How did the archaeologists know that the statue was a goddess?

translations.zh-Hans: 考古学家是怎么知道这尊塑像是一位女神的？

segments.text: Some time ago, an interesting discovery was made by archaeologists on the Aegean island of Kia.

translations.zh-Hans: 不久以前，考古学家在爱琴海的基亚岛上有了一项有趣的发现。

segments.text: An American team explored a temple which stands in an ancient city on the promontory of Aegea Irene.

translations.zh-Hans: 一支美国考古队考察了坐落在阿伊亚·伊里尼海角一座古城中的神庙。

segments.text: The city at one time must have been prosperous, for it enjoyed a high level of often three stories high, were built of stone.

translations.zh-Hans: 这座城市当年一定很繁荣，因为它的文明程度很高，石头建成的房屋往往高达三层。

segments.text: They had large rooms with beautifully decorated walls.

translations.zh-Hans: 房间宽敞，墙壁装饰得十分精美。

segments.text: The city was even equipped with a drainage system, for a great many clay pipes were found beneath the narrow streets.

translations.zh-Hans: 城里甚至还有排水系统，因为在狭窄的街道下面发现了许多陶制管道。

segments.text: The temple which the archaeologists explored was used as a place of worship from the 15th BC until Roman times.

translations.zh-Hans: 考古学家考察的这座神庙，从公元前15世纪直至罗马时代一直是祭祀场所。

segments.text: In the most sacred room of the temple, clay fragments of 15 statues were found.

translations.zh-Hans: 在神庙最神圣的房间里，发现了15尊塑像的陶制碎片。

segments.text: Each of these represented a goddess and had, at one time, been painted.

translations.zh-Hans: 每尊塑像代表一位女神，而且都曾上过色。

segments.text: The body of one statue was found among remains dating from the 15th BC.

translations.zh-Hans: 其中一尊塑像的躯干是在公元前15世纪的遗迹中发现的。

segments.text: Its missing head happened to be among remains of the 5th BC.

translations.zh-Hans: 而它失落的头部碰巧出现在公元前5世纪的遗迹中。

segments.text: This head must have been found in classical times and carefully preserved.

translations.zh-Hans: 这个头部一定是在古典时期被发现并被精心保存了下来。

segments.text: It was very old and precious even then.

translations.zh-Hans: 即使在当时，它也已经非常古老而珍贵。

segments.text: When the archaeologists reconstructed the fragments, they were amazed to find that the goddess turned out to be a very modern looking woman.

translations.zh-Hans: 考古学家把碎片重新拼合起来后，惊讶地发现这位女神竟是一位相貌十分现代的女子。

segments.text: She stood three feet high and her hands rested on her hips.

translations.zh-Hans: 她有三英尺高，双手叉腰。

segments.text: She was wearing a full length skirt which swept the ground.
Despite her great age, she was very graceful indeed, but, so far, the archaeologists have been unable to discover her identity.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管年代久远，她的姿态仍十分优雅；不过到目前为止，考古学家仍未能查明她的身份。
